==========================================
  WhisperKey v0.2.1 - Package Location
==========================================

📦 DEBIAN PACKAGE READY!

Location: dist/whisperkey_0.2.1_all.deb
Size: 100KB
Type: Debian binary package (format 2.0)

==========================================
  QUICK SHARE
==========================================

To share this package with someone:

1. Copy the .deb file:
   cp dist/whisperkey_0.2.1_all.deb ~/Desktop/

2. Or create a complete bundle:
   tar -czf whisperkey-bundle.tar.gz dist/

3. Send via email, USB, cloud storage, etc.

==========================================
  FILES IN THIS DIRECTORY
==========================================

whisperkey_0.2.1_all.deb       - Ubuntu/Debian package
README-FOR-COLLEAGUE.md        - User-friendly guide
INSTALL-INSTRUCTIONS.txt       - Quick reference
PACKAGE-INFO.txt              - This file

==========================================
  VERIFY PACKAGE
==========================================

Check package is valid:
  dpkg-deb --info dist/whisperkey_0.2.1_all.deb

View contents:
  dpkg-deb --contents dist/whisperkey_0.2.1_all.deb

==========================================
  REBUILD PACKAGE
==========================================

To rebuild the package:
  ./build-deb.sh

Or use Makefile:
  make deb

==========================================

Built: October 9, 2025
Ready to distribute!
